news.headline: AVITA Medical introduces Cohealyx in the U.S., a collagen-based dermal matrix enhancing tissue integration and revascularization.
news.summary: AVITA Medical has introduced Cohealyx™ in the United States, a collagen-based dermal matrix that aims to encourage tissue integration and revascularization. This launch marks a significant milestone for the company as they expand their product offerings in the U.S market. Cohealyx™ is designed to assist in promoting the healing process and has been developed to specifically support tissue integration and revascularization. This launch signifies AVITA Medical's commitment to providing innovative solutions to aid in tissue regeneration.

news.headline: Duolingo (Nasdaq: DUOL) to reveal Q1 2025 results on May 1, 2025, after US market close; video webcast at 5:30 p.m. ET.
news.summary: A Pittsburgh-based company, Duolingo, Inc. (Nasdaq: DUOL), a prominent mobile learning platform globally, is set to disclose its first-quarter outcomes for the period concluding on March 31, 2025. The announcement is scheduled post the U.S. market closure on Thursday, May 1, 2025. Subsequently, at 5:30 p.m. ET on the same day, the company will conduct a video webcast.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance named No. 34 on Fortune's 2025 Best Companies to Work For list, moving up 5 spots from last year.
news.summary: In Southfield, Michigan, on April 03, 2025, Credit Acceptance Corporation (NASDAQ: CACC) has been recognized as one of the 100 Best Companies to Work For® by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine. This marks the eleventh time the company has received this honor, achieving a rank of #34, five spots higher than the previous year.

news.headline: NetraMark & Worldwide Clinical Trials to transform clinical trial design with AI-powered precision analytics.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Toronto, NetraMark Holdings Inc. (referred to as "the Company" or "NetraMark") announced its presence in the market through trading under CSE: AIAI, OTCQB: AINMF, and Frankfurt: PF0. NetraMark is a leading player in AI, specifically in the pharmaceutical sector, focusing on revolutionizing clinical trials by leveraging AI to drive precision analytics.

news.headline: Martha Stewart to be Global Storyteller at Vivid Sydney 2025, sharing career insights and personal brand journey.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Sydney, the iconic Martha Stewart, a pioneer influencer even before the term was popular, will grace Vivid Sydney with her presence for a special In Conversation event. This exclusive one-time event will delve into Martha's remarkable career and how her personal brand has evolved over the years.

news.headline: Triad Business Bank amends unaudited 2024 results, $1.1 million credit loss allowance included.
news.summary: In Greensboro, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, Triad Business Bank released unaudited financial results for 2024 via a press release issued on February 25, 2025. The results from that period included an allowance for credit loss of $1.1 million related to a publicly traded corporate entity.

news.headline: I-Mab (NASDAQ: IMAB) reports 2024 financials, focused on immuno-oncology for cancer treatment in a business update.
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on April 3, 2025, I-Mab (NASDAQ: IMAB), a prominent U.S.-based biotech firm specializing in precision immuno-oncology treatments for cancer, unveiled their financial performance for the entire year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company also shared significant advancements in their pipeline and provided updates on their business operations.

news.headline: Moomoo and NY Mets partner on multimillion-dollar sponsorship to enhance fan experience and community engagement.
news.summary: In Jersey City, New Jersey, it was reported on April 3, 2025, that Moomoo, a worldwide investment and trading platform, has unveiled a significant partnership with the New York Mets. This multiyear agreement involves a multimillion-dollar sponsorship deal that aims to elevate the sports involvement for fans, players, Moomoo clients, and communities in the New York tri-state region through innovative projects and combined endeavors.

news.headline: ARB IOT Group introduces AI drone tech for plantation management to boost efficiency and sustainability; aims to optimize mapping processes.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on April 3, 2025, ARB IOT Group Limited unveiled its new AI-powered plantation mapping system integrated with drone technology called the Smart AI Drone. The company, also known as ARB IOT and listed on NASDAQ as ARBB, aims to transform plantation management through this advancement. The innovative system is targeted to streamline plantation mapping, improve efficiency, increase crop yields, and promote sustainability in modern agriculture.

news.headline: Praxis Precision Medicines grants 8,763 shares to 4 new non-executive employees under 2024 Inducement Plan.
news.summary: On April 1, 2025, Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. (Nasdaq: PRAX) based in Boston, disclosed that it awarded restricted stock units totaling 8,763 shares of common stock to four incoming non-executive staff members. These awards were issued under the Praxis Precision Medicines, Inc. 2024 Inducement Plan. The company specializes in developing treatments for central nervous system disorders associated with neuronal balance issues. This move was made by the Compensation Committee of Praxis’ Board of Directors as part of the terms under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: MindsDB announces support for Model Context Protocol, reducing data sprawl and fueling AI innovation.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, MindsDB, a prominent AI data integration company, revealed its full endorsement for the Model Context Protocol (MCP) throughout all its open-source and enterprise systems. This move establishes MindsDB as a centralized AI data hub, solidifying its position in the industry.

news.headline: India captive power generation market valued at INR 1.18 trillion in 2024, expected to reach INR 1.74 trillion by 2029, growing at 8.55% CAGR.
news.summary: The report "Captive Power Generation Market in India" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. In 2024, the captive power generation market in India was valued at INR 1.18 trillion, with projections to reach INR 1.74 trillion by 2029. This represents a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.55% during the forecast period of 2025-2029. The rapid growth of India's captive power generation market is primarily fueled by industrial expansion and concerns regarding energy security.

news.headline: March's employment report will reveal if hiring remains strong in the US labor market, with forecasts expecting a rise of 135,000 nonfarm payrolls, down from 151,000 in February. Potential government layoffs remain a risk factor.
news.summary: The U.S. labor market is a major strength amidst ongoing trade tariff concerns. The Bureau of Labor Statistics will release the March Employment Situation report, with economists expecting a slowdown in hiring, predicting a rise of 135,000 nonfarm payrolls compared to 151,000 in February. Job gains have averaged 175,000 per month over the past year, but the latest ADP employment report showed an increase of only 155,000 jobs in March. Concerns arise over government layoffs, which could turn negative for the first time since April 2024. Public-sector payrolls rose by 11,000 in February, but government hiring has averaged 33,000 jobs per month over the past year. These numbers suggest a potential cooling trend in the labor market.

news.headline: Subaru Cherry Blossom Festival of Greater Philadelphia on April 5th & 6th, 2025 by Japan America Society & Subaru. Family & dog-friendly event.
news.summary: The Japan America Society of Greater Philadelphia along with Subaru of America, Inc. will host their yearly Spring Celebration in Philadelphia. This event brings a touch of Japan to the city, showcasing the beauty of Japanese Sakura cherry blossom trees. This ticketed event is open to families and dog owners, ensuring a fun experience for all. The celebration will take place rain or shine, offering a unique cultural experience in the city.

news.headline: Careington expands savings plans through Employer Enrollment Portal in FRISCO; Careington Direct offers new options.
news.summary: In Frisco, Texas on April 3, 2025, Careington International Corporation announced the addition of new plan options to Careington Direct, its self-service web portal designed for small group plan enrollment. The company is pleased to offer a wider range of plans through this portal, providing a comprehensive solution for customers.

news.headline: Loar Holdings' IBD rating rose from 94 to 98, showing improvement, pushing stock to front of pack.
news.summary: Loar Holdings experienced a notable increase in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating on Thursday, rising from 94 to 98. This upgrade indicates the company's improved performance and market position. The stock for Young Loar surged to the forefront and received a rating boost, showcasing promising growth in its sector. This latest development underscores Loar Holdings' strengthened market presence and positive trajectory.

news.headline: Nvidia and SMCI stocks plunging due to tariff uncertainty, advise caution before buying.
news.summary: Stocks of Nvidia and SMCI are experiencing significant declines due to uncertainty surrounding tariffs. This presents a potential buying opportunity for investors looking to capitalize on the dip. Before purchasing these stocks at their discounted prices, it is crucial to consider a certain factor.

news.headline: Stock market plunges as Dow drops 1,600 points on tariffs, small caps face bear market. Some stocks shine.
news.summary: A significant downturn hit the stock market today following President Trump's implementation of broad tariffs, with techs, small caps, banks, private equity, and other sectors driving the sell-off. The Dow Jones Industrial Average plummeted by 1,600 points. Small caps experienced a bear market drop. However, amidst the turmoil, certain stocks like MercadoLibre, Northrop, and Kinsale Capital stood out with strong performances. The market witnessed high volatility and uncertainty as investors reacted to the tariff announcement.

news.headline: Needham Bank ranked #20 in S&P Global Market Intelligence's Best-Performing Large U.S. Community Banks of 2024.
news.summary: Needham, Massachusetts - On April 3, 2025, Needham Bank revealed its ranking as the 20th best-performing US community bank of 2024 by S&P Global Market Intelligence. This ranking is specifically within the category of banks with assets ranging from $3 billion to $10 billion. S&P Global Market Intelligence conducts annual rankings to assess the performances of various financial institutions.

news.headline: TikTok faces Saturday deadline to change ownership or get banned in U.S., as potential deal details surface.
news.summary: The video application is rapidly approaching a deadline set for Saturday to transition its ownership in accordance with federal regulations, failing which it may risk being banned in the United States.

news.headline: Broadcasters are rolling out NEXTGEN TV with improved video, audio, interactivity for 76% of American households in 78 markets.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, viewers tuning into college basketball championships on NEXTGEN TV are witnessing enhanced broadcasts with stunning High Dynamic Range (HDR) video and immersive Dolby Atmos audio. These upgrades, a feature of ATSC 3.0 broadcasts, are now accessible to 76% of American households across 78 viewing markets. Broadcasters nationwide are convening at the NAB Show in Las Vegas to showcase this cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Laureen Thompson appointed Head of People & Human Resources at Pivot Bio, bringing over 30 years of experience.
news.summary: Bringing over three decades of experience to her new role, Laureen Thompson has been appointed as the head of people at Pivot Bio. The announcement was made by the innovative agtech company based in Berkeley, California and Wayzata, Minnesota on April 3, 2025. Pivot Bio is recognized globally as a leader in the industry, with Thompson set to bring her expertise to the position.

news.headline: Clever's new Universal Integration Solution, Clever Complete, removes barriers between schools and edtech, improving K-12 ecosystem.
news.summary: Clever Complete has successfully removed integration obstacles for schools and their applications, fostering a more accessible ecosystem in K-12 educational technology. The organization, based in San Francisco, unveiled Clever Complete on April 3, 2025. Clever, a widely adopted global identity platform in U.S. schools, introduced this new system to streamline processes.

news.headline: Katten Report shows concerns persist despite hopes for improved M&A landscape amid rising volatility.
news.summary: In the year 2025, the Middle-Market Private Equity Report highlights ongoing worries regarding macroeconomic challenges and other obstacles amidst increasing volatility. Despite this, there is overall optimism for a more favorable M&A environment. The report, released in Chicago on April 3, 2025, indicates that the start of the year brought expectations of a stronger deal market in the United States.

news.headline: Dr. Malvina Eydelman appointed CEO of CCOI, a board dedicated to ophthalmic innovation. Effective immediately.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, on April 3, 2025, The Collaborative Community on Ophthalmic Innovation's Board of Directors revealed the selection of Malvina Eydelman, MD, as the new Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Dr. Eydelman, an esteemed figure in the field, will assume the CEO position right away.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
Draft resolutions for APRANGA's AGM on 30/04/2025 are being proposed by the Board; key decisions to be made then.
news.summary: The Board of Akcinė prekybos bendrovė "APRANGA" has recommended a draft agenda and draft resolutions for the Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 30, 2025. Shareholders are invited to participate in discussions regarding important matters concerning the company's future. Key proposals and decisions will be presented during the meeting, including resolution voting on significant topics like financial reports, board member elections, and strategic company plans. Shareholders are encouraged to review the proposed agenda and resolutions in preparation for the upcoming meeting.

news.headline: Istanbul Grand Airport won "Europe's Cleanest Airport" award featuring XLERATOR Hand Dryers by Excel Dryer.
news.summary: iGA, the Istanbul Grand Airport, has been honored as the recipient of the prestigious "Europe's Cleanest Airport" award. This recognition was achieved by implementing Excel Dryer technology in the restrooms. Excel Dryer, Inc., based in East Longmeadow, Massachusetts, is renowned for their touchless, high-efficiency hand dryers. The award was bestowed upon iGA for its commitment to cleanliness and efficiency. This accolade is especially significant given that Istanbul Grand Airport is one of the busiest airports in Europe.

news.headline: US manufacturing slipped into contraction as input prices surged in March, with the PMI dropping from 50.3% to 49%._prices hiked to 69.4%, highest since June 2022 in tariff-driven costs. Demand weakened, new orders fell to 45.2%, employment to 44.7%, and production to 48.3%.
news.summary: In March, U.S. factory activity declined as input prices surged, reaching the fastest pace since mid-2022, raising concerns about dwindling profit margins, escalating costs, and strained supply chains amidst looming reciprocal trade tariffs impacts. The Manufacturing Purchasing Managers' Index from the Institute for Supply Management dropped to 49% from February's 50.3%, signaling contraction. Input costs soared with the Prices Index hitting 69.4%, attributing the spike primarily to increased tariffs. New orders dropped to 45.2%, employment index fell to 44.7%, and production declined to 48.3%. These figures reveal a worrying stagflation possibility with weakening demand and escalating costs, as companies rush to navigate tariff-related challenges.

news.headline: Trump plans to unveil "Liberation Day" tariff plan imposing 20% on $3 trillion imports, could generate $600B-$1T revenue.
news.summary: President Trump is set to announce a significant tariff plan called "Liberation Day," which could raise U.S. trade duties to levels not seen in years, potentially disrupting global supply chains and impacting financial markets. The White House has drafted a proposal imposing tariffs of around 20% on most of the $3 trillion in goods imported into the U.S. annually. This new policy of economic nationalism aims to implement reciprocal tariffs to combat unfair trade practices, with estimates suggesting it could generate $600 billion to $1 trillion in revenue over the next year. The expected revenue implies an average tariff rate of 18% to 30%, significantly higher than the current average U.S. rate of 2.5% to 3%.

news.headline: S&P 500 faces challenges following Trump's tariffs.
RBC's Mui warns of markets in turmoil due to tariffs.
Warnings from economists suggest a rocky road ahead with potential recession due to tariffs.
Can newer cryptocurrencies surpass Bitcoin? The battle for market dominance continues as BTC reigns with the highest market cap.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) has maintained its leading position in the cryptocurrency market since its inception in 2009. It continues to be the most prominent and widely acknowledged digital asset based on market capitalization.

news.headline: Wall Street cautiously awaits Trump tariff details. Potential 20% tariff on $3 trillion imports. Businesses front-load purchases. Stocks stable.
news.summary: Following a period of poor performance for U.S. stocks in the last quarter, Wall Street was on edge as investors awaited news on the tariff plans set to be announced by the Trump administration, with reports indicating a possible 20% tariff on a majority of the $3 trillion in annual imports. Survey data revealed that businesses in the goods-producing sector had been increasing purchases in anticipation of these tariffs, leading to a rise in inventory levels and the highest level of input cost pressures seen in three years.By midday in New York, major indexes such as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 showed minimal movement, with only modest gains. Noteworthy stocks like Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA), Rivian Automotive Inc. (NASDAQ:RIVN), and Lucid Group Inc. (NASDAQ:LCID) were also part of the developments.

news.headline: Official affirms interest rates are suitable amidst uncertainty.
Dow Jones dips due to Trump's tariffs, Newsmax IPO surges 77%. Wall Street reacts to news.
news.summary: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a decline amid anticipation of President Trump's tariffs coming into play. Simultaneously, the Newsmax IPO surged by an impressive 77%. This news reflects the market's reaction to the ongoing trade tensions and the successful performance of Newsmax in the financial realm.

news.headline: Daversa Partners promotes Dan Marr to Partner, specializing in B2B marketing and sales for tech companies.
news.summary: A renowned headhunting firm, Daversa Partners, based in New York, has recently promoted Dan Marr to Partner. Dan, a specialist in B2B marketing and sales, has played a vital role in forming leadership teams for cutting-edge tech companies experiencing rapid growth. Specializing in next-gen AI and enterprise tech firms, Dan has successfully built senior management teams for early and mid-stage enterprises during his tenure with Daversa. This move reflects the firm's commitment to nurturing talent and promoting skilled personnel within its ranks.

news.headline: Nick Viall, ex-'Bachelor' star, inks podcast deal worth millions.
Former central banker Mark Carney imposes tariffs on U.S. cars as Stellantis plant halts. Urges new global trade pact without U.S. involvement.
news.summary: Mark Carney, a well-known central banker, urged other countries to come together to establish a new trading framework separate from the United States.

news.headline: DTJ DESIGN's Renegade Clubhouse at Desert Mountain wins 2nd place in Golf Inc.'s Golden Fork Awards for Food & Beverage.
news.summary: DTJ DESIGN is excited to announce that the Renegade Clubhouse at Desert Mountain has received the 2nd place award in Golf Inc.'s acclaimed Golden Fork Awards for the Food & Beverage Private New Facility category. This yearly competition celebrates excellence in the golf industry, with the Renegade Clubhouse standing out among competitors with its exceptional offerings.

news.headline: Black Health Matters to host free Spring Health Summit in D.C. on April 12th. Featuring life-saving screenings, trusted experts, and community health resources.
news.summary: A no-cost event is set to take place in Washington, D.C., offering critical screenings, expert guidance, and valuable health resources to the community. Scheduled for April 3, 2025, this event is organized by Black Health Matters (BHM), a prominent health equity platform focused on enhancing the well-being of Black individuals. This initiative aims to provide vital health services and support to the public, demonstrating a commitment to improving the health outcomes of the Black population.参151

news.headline: 1-800-STRIPER® opens affordable striping franchise in East Cleveland, providing budget-friendly maintenance for parking lots, sport courts, and interior spaces.
news.summary: A well-known pavement striping company has recently opened a new franchise location in East Cleveland, catering to property owners in need of affordable and easy striping solutions for deteriorating parking lots, sport courts, and indoor areas. This expansion was announced on April 3, 2025, and the new location began operations on March 1. The franchise aims to provide services to revamp spaces with faded markings, offering a variety of options to meet clients' needs effectively.

news.headline: Canadian PM imposes tariffs on US cars, predicts global chaos. Ex-central banker urges new trade alliance without US.
news.summary: Former central banker Mark Carney has urged other nations to join forces and establish a new trade alliance excluding the United States.
